items.title: The core design is about understanding, not output.” A design is an intention.
items.title_zh: 核心设计是关于理解，而不是输出。”设计是一种意图。

items.title: If AI can make employees more productive, which is widely accepted as fact, then companie…
items.title_zh: 如果人工智能可以提高员工的工作效率（这一点已被广泛接受），那么公司……
items.description: “If AI can make employees more productive, which is widely accepted as fact, then companies are going to want as many productive units of labor as possible. This is a key reason why I am changing my mind.” This is why jevons paradox is rea…
items.description_zh: “如果人工智能可以提高员工的生产力（这一点已被广泛接受），那么公司就会需要尽可能多的生产性劳动力。这是我改变想法的一个关键原因。”这就是为什么杰文斯悖论是真实的……
